title: Armor, Weapons, and Willpower
scene: On pages 1–4, the Baratie conflict focuses on Luffy, Sanji, Don Krieg, Gin, Zeff. Don Krieg relies on armor and hidden weapons while Luffy answers with reckless determination.

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: With the spear-Tip broken,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's nothing but a bomb on a stick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've reduced its power by half.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Is that what you think?

dialogue.speaker: Don Krieg
dialogue.text: U... Unbeliev- able! to think that Don Krieg's most powerful weapon,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The great war spear would be broken!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: He did it! He really is amazing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Considering that even a mere bomb on a stick can easily blow you away,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'd say that I still have more than enough power to win!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Not only that, you're bleeding all over and even took 2 blasts from my great battle spear.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: seems to me that you're bluffing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nuh uh!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...he's right, that errand boy should be on the verge of Collapsing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: With those wounds, if he takes even just one more blast from that spear,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He'll be killed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Damn it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: With all those weapons and armour, it's almost impossible to beat him!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But you know, Sanji... no matter how many hundreds of weapons or armour one is equipped with,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: They're no match for that "one special spear" that comes from your guts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: on the pirates' battlefield where life and death are decided,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: The one who fears death and hesitates for even an instant shall fall to their doom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What do you mean by that?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: within that boy, if nothing else,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: lies no hesitation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hee hee. Hee.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Perhaps it stems from his complete preparedness to survive no matter what,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Or his conviction that fears no death...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: convic- Tion...!?

summary: This part keeps the Baratie battle centered on willpower, debt, hunger, and pride. The dialogue shows who still stands firm after Krieg’s violence and who is ready to break away from the restaurant’s old life.
